scripts.lint: eslint src workers scripts tests/**/*.ts vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts vitest.endurance.config.ts
scripts.test:browser:journeys: node tests/browser-navigation-journeys.js && node tests/browser-progression-journeys.js && node tests/browser-playground-journeys.js && node tests/browser-terminal-journeys.js && node tests/browser-cinematic-preferences.js
scripts.test:browser:platform: node tests/platform-browser-smoke.js standalone && node tests/platform-browser-smoke.js crazygames
scripts.check:ghost-cloud: wrangler types workers/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.ghost.jsonc && tsc -p tsconfig.worker.json && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.ghost.jsonc
scripts.check:local: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm test
scripts.check:pr: pnpm tearbench ci --files-from artifacts/tearbench/changed-files.txt && pnpm check
scripts.check:weekly: pnpm test:endurance && pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/ghost-replay-world.test.ts tests/unit/ghost-capsule-vault.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm check:architecture && pnpm test && pnpm test:weapons && pnpm check:tear-score && pnpm build && pnpm check:test-isolation && pnpm check:bundles && pnpm check:crazygames-package && pnpm check:reproducible && pnpm check:cloudflare && pnpm check:ghost-cloud && pnpm build:test && pnpm test:browser && pnpm test:browser:features && pnpm test:browser:bosses && pnpm test:browser:journeys && pnpm test:browser:agent-journey && pnpm test:browser:input && pnpm test:browser:responsive && pnpm test:browser:performance && pnpm test:browser:audio && pnpm test:browser:platform && pnpm test:browser:crazygames-iframe && pnpm test:pwa
